AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Enjoy Fresh Produce Bananas Lady Finger, perfect for a quick snack, naturally sweet and delicious for the whole family. Shop now at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Lady Finger bananas are shorter, less curved, and can be sweeter than Cavendish bananas.

How to Pick:
Bananas that are yellow and lightly flecked with brown spots will be at their peak flavor. Bananas should be plump, firm, and brightly colored

How to Store:
Store bananas at room temperature, where they will continue to ripen. If you refrigerate your bananas, they will stop ripening, but this will also make the skins go black. The fruit is still okay to eat, but will not be the best quality.

Where it's Grown:
Australian Lady Finger Bananas are grown in Far North Queensland and Northern NSW.

Health Benefits:
Bananas contain potassium for heathy muscle function, and are high in energy-supprting vitamin B6* 

*Based on one large cavendish banana, or 2 medium lady finger bananas (150g), as part of a healthy balanced diet

With dark burgundy skin, vibrant white flesh and sweet taste, the Bravo apple is like no other™

How to Pick:
Apples should be bright and crunchy, with a tight skin and juicy flesh. Our apples have a natural shine and no added wax.

Consume apples within 2 weeks for the best eating experience.

No matter the variety, apples contain fibre, that aids in healthy digestion, and vitamin C, to support the immune system*

*Based on one medium apple (150g), as part of a healthy balanced diet

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Woolworths Bird's Eye Chilli Hot. A mighty product with very hot heat and sweet flavour, it's ideal for Asian cooking. Available at Woolworths online.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Bird's eye chillies are small but mighty, offering very hot heat with a sweet flavour - perfect for those who enjoy a spicy kick. They are most popular in a range of Asian cuisines such as Indonesian, Vietnamese and Thai.

Add heat and flavour to your favourites such as Red Curries, Chilli & Basil Stir Fries, Pad Thais, Vietnamese Noodle Salad, Laksas or Rendang - the list is endless.

How to Store:
Best stored in the refrigerator. Do not fully cover fresh chillies to prevent condensation and encourage long life. Freeze leftover chillies for future use: wash then pat dry with a paper towel or clean cloth then cut off the stems, slice and freeze in a container or freezer bag.

Where They're Grown:
Chillies are grown in the tropical and subtropical climates of Australia. The majority of our chillies are grown in Bundaberg in QLD, which has the ideal climate for growing chillies.

Availability:
All year round.

Health Benefits:
Chillies are high in Vitamin C and antioxidants that support healthy immune function.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Woolworths White Flat Mushrooms is your versatile choice for your next BBQ. Grown in Australia, it's simple to prepare. Order online from Woolworths today.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Woolworths White Flat Mushrooms are proudly Australian grown, offering a hearty, earthy flavour. Perfect for grilling and cooking, they add rich taste and satisfying texture.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose firm, smooth mushrooms with an even colour. Avoid soft spots, shrivelled edges, or excess moisture.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store in their punnet or a paper bag in the refrigerator. This keeps them fresh. Avoid airtight containers, which cause spoilage.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Ideal for barbecuing, sautéing, roasting, or stuffing. Enjoy as a flavourful side, in burgers, or a meat-free option.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Bake, barbecue, grill, roast, sauté, stir-fry.
</section>

<section><header>Where it's Grown:</header> These flat mushrooms are proudly Australian grown by our partners, Costa Mushrooms. They are available year-round, harvested fresh.</section>

Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Fresh Eggplant' has a supply limit of 36. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Enjoy Fresh Eggplant, perfect for a variety of meals. With its mild flavour and versatile texture, it's a delicious addition to your cooking. Shop now at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Fresh Eggplant is a versatile vegetable. Its glossy, deep purple skin and firm, creamy flesh offer a mild flavour, readily absorbing other ingredients. Popular in many savoury dishes.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose firm, heavy eggplants with smooth, shiny, deep purple skin. Avoid soft spots or discolouration.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store fresh eggplant in a cool, dark place or refrigerator crisper for up to a week.
</section>

<section><header>How to Prepare:</header> Wash and trim the green stem. Slice or cube as needed; salting can draw out moisture. Rinse and pat dry before cooking.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Eggplant works well in Mediterranean and Asian dishes such as moussaka or curries. Grill, bake, fry, or roast it for meals or sides.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Want to add flavour without too much heat? Red Cayenne Chillies are a mild-medium and versatile solution for family favourite meals. Shop now at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Red Cayenne Chillies are a mild-medium chilli, with sweet notes, often referred to as a 'long red'. They are a great all-rounder chilli for those who are after adding a hint of heat that is family-friendly.

Use Red Cayennes in a range of family favourites such as chilli con carne, bolognese, lasagne, soups, stews and more. Red Cayennes are also perfect to use as a substitute for any recipe that call for hotter red chillies, such as Asian salads and curries, where you want to keep the flavour but control the heat.

How to Store:
Best stored in the refrigerator. Do not fully cover fresh chillies to prevent condensation and encourage long life. Freeze leftover chillies for future use: wash then pat dry with a paper towel or clean cloth then cut off the stems, slice and freeze in a container or freezer bag.

Where They're Grown:
Chillies are grown in the tropical and subtropical climates of Australia. The majority of our chillies are grown in Bundaberg in QLD, which has the ideal climate for growing chillies.

Availability:
All year round.

Health Benefits:
Chillies are high in Vitamin C and antioxidants that support healthy immune function.

<section>Woolworths Finely Shredded Coleslaw offers a convenient blend of crunchy, finely sliced cabbage and carrot. This fresh mix is washed and ready to use, providing a crisp and vibrant base for your favourite salads and meals.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> As a pre-packaged mix, this coleslaw is washed and ready to use for your convenience. Ensure the packaging is sealed and undamaged before enjoying.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> This versatile coleslaw mix is perfect as a side dish or a base for a main meal. Create a simple dressing with lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, cumin, and salt for a delicious addition to any plate. It's also great in wraps, sandwiches, or as a crunchy topping.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store in the refrigerator to maintain freshness and crunch. Consume by the best before date printed on the pack.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> This coleslaw mix is prepared for raw consumption and does not require cooking. It is best enjoyed fresh and chilled.</section>

<section>Woolworths Mixed Leaf Salad offers a vibrant blend of washed and ready to eat red and green baby leaves. This fresh, crisp mix provides a convenient and delicious base for your favourite salads and meals. It is also a source of dietary fibre.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose packs with fresh, vibrant leaves that are free from wilting or discolouration. Look for a good mix of red and green varieties.

</section>

</section>

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Woolworths Truss Cocktail Tomatoes. Australian Grown & delicious, ideal for fresh or roasted meals. Order online from Woolworths today.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Woolworths Truss Cocktail Tomatoes are vibrant, juicy gems grown on the vine. They offer a naturally sweet flavour, perfect for enjoying fresh or roasting.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose tomatoes that are firm and plump, with a bright red colour. The vine should be green and fresh. Avoid any soft spots or blemishes.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Enjoy fresh in salads, as a snack, or added to sandwiches. Roasting on the vine brings out intense sweetness. They make a delicious side or pasta sauce addition.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store truss tomatoes at room temperature, away from direct sunlight, for best flavour. For longer storage, refrigerate and allow to warm before eating. Keep on the vine until use.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Bake, grill, roast.</section>
